title: gnomonia ovina var. supina
intro: Gnomonia ovina var. supina, also known as the gnomonia plant, is a species of fungus that belongs to the family Gnomoniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of the gnomonia plant include relieving congestion, reducing inflammation, and promoting overall respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried extract, which can be used to treat various respiratory conditions.
